ANDRE de Brienne, son of GAUTHIER [II] Comte de Brienne & his his [first/second] wife Humbeline de Baudément (-killed in battle Acre Oct 1189).

zh.Ramerupt, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Franc: 法國哈帕格-亞登奧布拉莫盧普特
zh.Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Arde: 法國哈帕格-亞登奧布布利恩勒-a奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當André II de Brienne於大約1132年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布布利恩勒-a奧時，他的父親Comte Gautier II de Brienne38歲，母親Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont32歲。他和Adélais de Venisy至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1189年10月4日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当André II de Brienne于大约1132年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布布利恩勒-a奧时，他的父亲Comte Gautier II de Brienne38岁，母亲Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont32岁。他和Adélais de Venisy至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1189年10月4日在以色列מחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹ享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: André
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Andrew  , now also used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When André II de Brienne was born about 1132, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, was 38 and his mother, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Adélais de Venisy. He died on 4 October 1189, in Acre, Northern, Israel, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque André II de Brienne est né environ 1132, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Adélais de Venisy. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1189, à Acre, Northern, Israël, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als André II de Brienne um 1132 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Gautier II de Brienne 38 und seine Mutter Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont 32. Er hatte mit Adélais de Venisy mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1189 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Israel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando André II de Brienne è nato il circa 1132 nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Adélais de Venisy. Morì il 4 ottobre 1189, nel Acre, Northern, Israele, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: André II de Brienneが約1132年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで生まれた時，父Comte Gautier II de Brienneは38歳，母Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémontは32歳であった。彼はAdélais de Venisyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1189年10月4日にイスラエルמחוז הצפוןעַכּוֹで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: André II de Brienne(이)가 대략 1132년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Gautier II de Brienne(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Adélais de Venisy(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년 10월 4일 이스라엘 מחוז הצפון עַכּוֹ에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando André II de Brienne nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Adélais de Venisy. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1189, em Acre, Northern, Israel, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда André II de Brienne родился около 1132 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Gautier II de Brienne было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Adélais de Venisy. Он умер 4 октября 1189 г. в местности עַכּוֹ, מחוז הצפון, Израиль в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando André II de Brienne nació aproximadamente 1132, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Comte Gautier II de Brienne, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Adélaïde Humbeline de Baudémont, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Adélais de Venisy. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1189, en Acre, Northern, Israel, a la edad de 58 años.
